overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through the Badlands desert area. The player moves through narrow passages between derelict container structures, passes under a metal bridge, and emerges into an open area with an abandoned stadium. The environment features post-apocalyptic architecture with shipping containers, scrap metal, and abandoned vehicles under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor between derelict shipping container structures

events.description: child pedestrian crosses the path from right to left
passing under the metal bridge structure overhead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow passage lined with scrap metal and container structures

notable_agents.action: person in orange pants standing by the wall, then exiting frame
child in light clothing crossing the path from right to left

entered.detail: tall stacked shipping containers with graffiti and rusted metal
rusted corrugated metal sheets forming a barrier wall
rusted metal walkway bridge spanning the corridor above
large dome-shaped building visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow corridor formed by derelict container buildings on the left and scrap metal walls on the right. A person stands near the wall on the right before exiting the frame, followed by a child crossing the path ahead. The camera approaches and passes under a rusted metal bridge overhead, with harsh sunlight casting sharp shadows on the dirt ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: open badlands area with abandoned stadium

events.description: exiting the narrow corridor into wide open desert area
pedestrian ahead transitions from walking to running

agents.ego_description: walking across open desert terrain toward a large abandoned stadium structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction, then breaking into a run toward the stadium

entered.detail: massive circular abandoned stadium with tiered seating and weathered concrete
futuristic skyscrapers visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage into a wide-open desert landscape under a clear blue sky. The massive abandoned stadium dominates the right side of the frame, while the path continues toward distant futuristic city buildings on the horizon. A pedestrian ahead increases pace from walking to running across the dusty terrain toward the stadium.

scene_state.functional_zone: settlement entrance with heavy construction machinery

events.description: large orange construction vehicle comes into view on the left side
camera moves onto concrete pavement near the construction vehicle

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a large orange construction vehicle parked on the left side

entered.detail: large orange heavy machinery with treads and smokestack emitting smoke
cluster of makeshift buildings and market stalls ahead

segments.scene_description: Approaching a settlement area marked by a large orange construction vehicle parked on the left. The abandoned stadium recedes into the background as the camera advances. The ground transitions from dirt to concrete pavement as the camera passes the heavy machinery, with makeshift settlement structures visible ahead in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a vast, open desert landscape. It begins by navigating a narrow passage flanked by derelict container buildings and scrap metal walls, passing a few pedestrians before moving under the heavy shadow of a rusted metal bridge. As the camera emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens into a wide expanse under a clear blue sky, where a massive abandoned stadium dominates the horizon and a pedestrian runs across the dusty terrain. The perspective then shifts toward a nearby settlement, passing a large orange construction vehicle as the ground transitions from dirt to concrete pavement. Finally, the stadium recedes into the background as the camera advances toward makeshift structures in the distance.
